== 🌐 Web4 Documentation ==

Welcome to the official documentation for the Web4 Ecosystem.

This wiki is the central documentation hub for the Web4 platform and its associated projects. It includes technical documentation, architecture guides, APIs, SDKs, tutorials, deployment guides, and developer resources.

== 📖 Documentation ==

* [[Getting Started]]
* [[Installation]]
* [[Quick Start]]
* [[Architecture]]
* [[API Reference]]
* [[SDK Documentation]]
* [[Authentication]]
* [[Deployment]]
* [[Configuration]]
* [[Reference]]


- [[Web4]]
- [[QubuHub]]
- [[Aura Ecosystem]]
- [[Fadaka Blockchain]]
- [[GPT-5 Mini]]
- [[RODAAI]]
- [[LMLM]]
- [[NeuroMindAI]]
- [[LAMIS]]

---

== 📖 Documentation ==

- [[Getting Started]]
- [[Installation]]
- [[Architecture]]
- [[API]]
- [[Tutorials]]
- [[Reference]]

---

== 🛠 Developers ==

- [[Contributing]]
- [[Coding Standards]]
- [[Docker]]
- [[CI/CD]]
- [[Release Process]]

== 🚀 Projects ==

* [[Web4]]
* [[QubuHub]]
* [[Aura Ecosystem]]
* [[Fadaka Blockchain]]
* [[GPT-5 Mini]]
* [[RODAAI]]
* [[LMLM]]
* [[NeuroMindAI]]
* [[LAMIS]]
⸻

🛠 Developer Resources

* [[Contributing]]
* [[Coding Standards]]
* [[Project Structure]]
* [[Docker]]
* [[CI/CD]]
* [[Security]]
* [[Testing]]
* [[Release Process]]

⸻

== 📚 Tutorials ==

* [[Build Your First AI]]
* [[Create an API]]
* [[Deploy to Production]]
* [[Blockchain Development]]
* [[AI Agents]]
* [[Model Integration]]

⸻

== 📚 Resources ==

* [[Roadmap]]
* [[FAQ]]
* [[Changelog]]
* [[License]]
* [[Glossary]]

⸻

== 🤝 Community ==

* [[Discussions]]
* [[Issues]]
* [[Feature Requests]]
* [[Releases]]

⸻

== 📚 Resources ==

- [[Roadmap]]
- [[FAQ]]
- [[Changelog]]
- [[License]]
